headline: Trump 🍊🚢 BLOCKADE HUNTING VENEZUELA'S THIRD OIL TANKER 🛢️💥
text:
US Coast Guard 🛥️⚓️ going FULL Rambo 💪🔥 on VENEZUELA'S shady DARK FLEET 🚢🕶️ – CHASING 😤🏃‍♂️ a THIRD oil tanker THICC with sanctioned PDVSA crude 🛢️🍑 in international waters near Madurito's oil paradise! Days after DONALD J TRUMP 🍊👑 dropped the BLOCKADE BOMB 💣🚫 on tankers dipping in/out of Venezuela's MASSIVE oil reserves 🤑⛽️ – world's biggest proven stash but Maduro's cartel crew 🤡💰 turning it into DRUG MONEY LAUNDRY 🤑🚬! Already SNATCHED two this month 📅🔒 – Saturday's Panamanian-flagged ghost ship 🛳️🇵🇦 boarded by TAC TEAM SWAT 🕵️‍♂️💥 carrying 'sanctioned PDVSA oil' despite fake flags from Greece 🇬🇷 & Liberia 🇱🇷 – BBC Verify spilling the tea ☕📜!

Sunday's pursuit? A 'sanctioned dark fleet baddie' flying FALSE FLAG 🚩😈 under JUDICIAL SEIZURE ORDER ⚖️🔒 – US official TEA-SHADING ☕👀: 'Venezuela's ILLEGAL sanctions EVASION scam!' Washington accuses Maduro's CARTEL DE LOS SOLES ☀️🤬 – designated TERROR ORG 🧨😱 – of funding narco CRIME with oil bucks 💸🌿, while Caracas cries THEFT & KIDNAPPING 😭🛢️! Venezuela RAGING 🤬: 'These acts WON'T GO UNPUNISHED' – filing UN SC complaint 📜🌍 & whining to world govs like salty simps 😢📢!

Trump's MILITARY BUILDUP in Caribbean 🌴⚔️ – DEADLY STRIKES 💥☠️ on 'drug boats' wiping out ~100 narcos 🚤💀, but Congress sniffing around NO EVIDENCE 🕵️‍♂️❓! Over 30/80 tankers in VZ waters SANCTIONED 🚫📊 per TankerTrackers.com – Rubio 👨‍💼🔥 Friday: 'Maduro's REGIME UN-TOLERABLE 😡🇺🇸 – time to FLIP the SCRIPT 📖➡️!' VZ FM clapping back: 'Rubio dragging US into REGIME CHANGE HELL 🔥😈!' Oil = VZ's LIFEBLOOD 💉🛢️ for gov spending, but Trump's squeezing BALLS 🔒🥜 till Maduro taps out! Sanctions on fam & biz cronies too 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦🚫 – who's the real DADDY now, NICOLÁS? 🍊👑 vs Maduro mustache man 😏🤑 – TANKER THROWDOWN incoming! 🚢💥🌎
